_comment: An ASSET, not a table. Declared in Files.tsv with typeName=asset_file,
_comment2: so the loader never parses it: it is copied byte-for-byte to every
_comment3: export, exactly as you see it here. Note the deliberately un-tabular
_comment4: shape below -- nested objects, no rows, no columns. There is no schema
_comment5: this could be read as, and it never has to be one.
